mapper.select: SELECT role_permission.permission FROM user_info, role_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_permission.role = user_info.role
mapper.insert: insert into user_info (phone, user_name, password, email, garminPassword, real_name, identity_number, city, province, country, avatar, nwpu) values (#{phone},#{userName},#{password},#{email},#{garminPassword},#{realName},#{identityNumber},#{city},#{province},#{country},#{avatar},#{nwpu})
mapper.select:
SELECT user_info.user_id, phone, user_name, email, garminPassword, real_name, identity_number, city, province, country,avatar, nwpu, sex, birth_date, height, weight, depressed, remark, user_info.nwpu_id, college, grade, user_info.type, user_info.add_timestamp_mils,user_info.mod_timestamp_mils FROM user_info LEFT JOIN user_health_info on user_health_info.user_id = user_info.user_id LEFT JOIN nwpu_user_info on user_info.user_id = nwpu_user_info.user_id where user_health_info.doctor_id=#{doctorId}
AND user_info.user_name like concat('%', #{userName} ,'%')
AND user_info.real_name like concat('%', #{realName} ,'%')
AND user_health_info.sex like concat('%', #{sex} ,'%')
AND user_info.phone like concat('%', #{phone} ,'%')
ORDER BY user_info.user_id ASC
